calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Raymone Garner, is present.
Attorney, Brenda Cruz Keith, appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Jaleta Jones, is present.
Attorney, Michael P. Monagle, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 1660 Newcomb Avenue, #A, San Francisco, CA. The trial date of June 2, 2008 is vacated.
